'''鈭歳-d-b''' ('''karadab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaff|quaff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-d-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaff|quaff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-d-b
|-
! Lemma
| karadab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiradab|thiradab]] || [[word:jiradab|jiradab]] || [[word:shiradab|shiradab]] || [[word:kiradab|kiradab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuradab|thuthuradab]] || [[word:jujuradab|jujuradab]] || [[word:shushuradab|shushuradab]] || [[word:kukuradab|kukuradab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuradab|thuradab]] || [[word:juradab|juradab]] || [[word:shuradab|shuradab]] || [[word:kuradab|kuradab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuradab|thuradab]] || [[word:juradab|juradab]] || [[word:shuradab|shuradab]] || [[word:kuradab|kuradab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theradab|theradab]] || [[word:jeradab|jeradab]] || [[word:sheradab|sheradab]] || [[word:keradab|keradab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoradab|thothoradab]] || [[word:jojoradab|jojoradab]] || [[word:shoshoradab|shoshoradab]] || [[word:kokoradab|kokoradab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoradab|thoradab]] || [[word:joradab|joradab]] || [[word:shoradab|shoradab]] || [[word:koradab|koradab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoradab|thoradab]] || [[word:joradab|joradab]] || [[word:shoradab|shoradab]] || [[word:koradab|koradab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙radab|th忙radab]] || [[word:j忙radab|j忙radab]] || [[word:sh忙radab|sh忙radab]] || [[word:k忙radab|k忙radab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharadab|thatharadab]] || [[word:jajaradab|jajaradab]] || [[word:shasharadab|shasharadab]] || [[word:kakaradab|kakaradab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharadab|tharadab]] || [[word:jaradab|jaradab]] || [[word:sharadab|sharadab]] || [[word:karadab|karadab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharadab|tharadab]] || [[word:jaradab|jaradab]] || [[word:sharadab|sharadab]] || [[word:karadab|karadab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharadab|sharadab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharadab|gosharadab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharadab|gokisharadab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharadabn眉|sharadabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharadabnkn眉|gosharadabnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharadabn眉|gokisharadabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharadabsh毛|sharadabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharadabnksh毛|gosharadabnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharadabsh毛|gokisharadabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharadabro|sharadabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharadabnkro|gosharadabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharadabro|gokisharadabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharadabmu|sharadabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharadabnkmu|gosharadabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharadabmu|gokisharadabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharadabsher|sharadabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharadabnksher|gosharadabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharadabsher|gokisharadabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharadabng|sharadabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharadabnkng|gosharadabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharadabng|gokisharadabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharadabya|sharadabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharadabnkya|gosharadabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharadabya|gokisharadabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharadabyam|sharadabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharadabnkyam|gosharadabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharadabyam|gokisharadabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharadabn眉sh毛|sharadabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharadabnkn眉sh毛|gosharadabnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharadabn眉sh毛|gokisharadabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharadabn眉ro|sharadabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharadabnkn眉ro|gosharadabnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharadabn眉ro|gokisharadabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharadabn眉mu|sharadabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharadabnkn眉mu|gosharadabnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharadabn眉mu|gokisharadabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharadabsh毛n眉|sharadabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharadabnksh毛n眉|gosharadabnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharadabsh毛n眉|gokisharadabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharadabsh毛ro|sharadabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharadabnksh毛ro|gosharadabnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharadabsh毛ro|gokisharadabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharadabsh毛mu|sharadabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharadabnksh毛mu|gosharadabnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharadabsh毛mu|gokisharadabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharadabron眉|sharadabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharadabnkron眉|gosharadabnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharadabron眉|gokisharadabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharadabrosh毛|sharadabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharadabnkrosh毛|gosharadabnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharadabrosh毛|gokisharadabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharadabromu|sharadabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharadabnkromu|gosharadabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharadabromu|gokisharadabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharadabmun眉|sharadabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharadabnkmun眉|gosharadabnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharadabmun眉|gokisharadabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharadabmush毛|sharadabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharadabnkmush毛|gosharadabnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharadabmush毛|gokisharadabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharadabmuro|sharadabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharadabnkmuro|gosharadabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharadabmuro|gokisharadabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
